label: Wall Climbing
text: The only purpose-built climbing wall for toddlers in Srinagar — building strength, balance and brave little hearts.

label: Small World Toys
alt: Educational toys sourced from the UK
text: A carefully chosen collection of toys from the United Kingdom, designed to grow key early skills through play.

label: Soft Play Area
alt: Safe soft play area for children
text: Srinagar's only soft play area designed specifically with our youngest explorers in mind — tumble, climb and giggle safely.

label: Splash Pool
text: An outdoor splash pool for cooling off and making a happy splash on warm summer days.

label: Outdoor Play Area
alt: Safe outdoor playground with soft flooring
text: A specially designed outdoor play area with soft, cushioned flooring so little adventurers can roam safely.

label: And so much more…
alt: Additional play facilities at Toddler World
text: From sensory corners to seasonal surprises, there's always something new to keep the fun going all year round.
